notes: Schema designed against full OPTCG rules universe, not just cards in this decklist.
All fields are optional unless marked REQUIRED â€” absent fields mean 'not applicable' for that card_category.
effect_parsed keys map to official timing keywords from the Comprehensive Rules.
counter_value (Character printed counter) is distinct from effect_parsed.counter (Event timing keyword).
Expandable: add new fields without breaking existing records â€” JSON allows sparse records.

verification_levels.L2_pulled: Data retrieved from at least 1 source, not yet cross-referenced or manually confirmed.
verification_levels.L3_verified: Cross-referenced against 2+ independent sources AND manually confirmed by player.
verification_levels.flagged: Data present but suspected incorrect â€” needs review before use.
verification_levels.flagged_conflict: Conflict between sources — needs resolution via hierarchy above.
verification_levels.flagged_errata: Confirmed errata — current text differs from original print. See card_versions[] for full history.

field_applicability.cost: Character, Event, Stage only â€” NOT Leader
field_applicability.counter_value: Character only â€” printed +N000 counter symbol
field_applicability.effect_parsed.counter: Event only â€” [Counter] timing keyword, distinct from counter_value

changelog.notes: Initial schema. 20 cards from Blue/Purple Sanji decklist.
Added errata versioning. card_versions[] array tracks full text history with effective dates. Added conflict_source and errata_confirmed flags to data resolution fields.

conflict_resolution_hierarchy: 1. en.onepiece-cardgame.com — current legal English text, always wins
3. optcgapi.com — bulk data, may lag behind errata
4. Manual pull — single source, lowest confidence

_schema_reference.name: REQUIRED. Card name
_schema_reference.card_category: REQUIRED. One of: Leader | Character | Event | Stage | DON!!
_schema_reference.type: Array of types e.g. ['Straw Hat Crew', 'Vinsmoke Family']
_schema_reference.attribute: Array of attributes. Leader/Character only. e.g. ['Strike']
_schema_reference.counter_value: Integer. Character only. The printed counter bonus e.g. 2000. Null if no counter symbol.
_schema_reference.set_name: Full set name e.g. Legacy of the Master
_schema_reference.rarity: C | UC | R | SR | L | SP | SEC
_schema_reference.also_named: Array. Cards treated as additional card names by effect text.

effect_parsed.on_play: Effect triggered when card is played.
effect_parsed.when_attacking: Effect triggered when this card attacks.
effect_parsed.on_block: Effect triggered when this card blocks.
effect_parsed.activate_main: Effect the player can choose to activate during Main Phase.
effect_parsed.blocker: Boolean or text. Keyword â€” card can redirect attacks to itself.
effect_parsed.counter: Event only. Effect usable during Counter Step of a battle.
effect_parsed.trigger: Effect activatable when card comes from Life zone.
effect_parsed.rush: Boolean. Character can attack the turn it is played.
effect_parsed.banish: Boolean. Damage bypasses Trigger; card goes to trash.
effect_parsed.your_turn: Continuous effect active only during your turn.
effect_parsed.opponent_turn: Continuous effect active only during opponent's turn.
effect_parsed.end_of_your_turn: Effect that fires at end of your turn.
effect_parsed.end_of_opponent_turn: Effect that fires at end of opponent's turn.
effect_parsed.on_ko: Effect that fires when this card is K.O.'d.
effect_parsed.when_ko: Effect that fires when this card K.O.'s something.
effect_parsed.don_attach: DON!! x# requirement for a conditional or cost-modified effect.
effect_parsed.condition: Plain-language description of any conditional requirement e.g. '4+ events in trash'.
effect_parsed.threshold: Boolean. True if card has a meaningful state change at a specific condition.
effect_parsed.once_per_turn: Boolean. Effect can only be used once per turn.

_schema_reference.in_decklist: Boolean. True if this card is in the player's active decklist.
_schema_reference.decklist_qty: Integer. Number of copies in player's decklist (1-4).
_schema_reference.data_sources: Array of source names used to populate this record.
_schema_reference.notes: Free-text. Flags, observations, things to verify.
_schema_reference.card_versions: Array of versioned card text records. Each entry is a snapshot of the card at a point in time. Most cards will have 1 entry. Errata'd cards will have 2+. Structure: [{ version: int, effective_date: 'YYYY-MM-DD', source: str, effect_text: str, effect_parsed: {}, notes: str }]
_schema_reference.errata_confirmed: Boolean. True if card has a confirmed official errata on record.
_schema_reference.conflict_source: String. Which sources disagree and on what field. Populated automatically by cross_reference.py.
_schema_reference.legal_text_as_of: Date string. When the current effect_text was confirmed as legal. Set when L3_verified via en.onepiece-cardgame.com.

cards.name: Sanji
cards.effect_text: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] DON!! -1: Activate up to 1 [Straw Hat Crew] type Event card with an original cost of 3 or less from your hand without paying its cost. [When Attacking] If your DON!! count is the same or less than your opponent's, add 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.

effect_parsed.activate_main: DON!! -1: Activate up to 1 {Straw Hat Crew} Event with original cost 3 or less from hand without paying cost.
effect_parsed.when_attacking: If your DON!! count <= opponent's, add 1 DON!! from DON!! deck, rest it.

cards.notes: Core leader. DON!! recovery engine. Activate: Main lets leader use events for free â€” key to understanding deck's tempo engine.

card_versions.effect_text: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] DON!! -1: Activate up to 1 [Straw Hat Crew] type Event card with an original cost of 3 or less from your hand without paying its cost. [When Attacking] If your DON!! count is the same or less than your opponent's, add 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.

effect_parsed.activate_main: DON!! -1: Activate up to 1 {Straw Hat Crew} Event with original cost 3 or less from hand without paying cost.
effect_parsed.when_attacking: If your DON!! count <= opponent's, add 1 DON!! from DON!! deck, rest it.

card_versions.notes: Initial record. Effective date unconfirmed — set when source verified.

cards.name: Otama
cards.effect_text: [On Play] If you have 3 or less Life cards, draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.
cards.notes: Late-game draw engine. 0 power means no board presence â€” purely hand quality. Threshold at 3 life.

card_versions.effect_text: [On Play] If you have 3 or less Life cards, draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand.
card_versions.notes: Initial record. Effective date unconfirmed — set when source verified.

cards.name: Charlotte Pudding
cards.effect_text: [On Play] Your opponent returns all cards in their hand to their deck and shuffles it. Then, your opponent draws 5 cards.

effect_parsed.on_play: Opponent shuffles hand into deck, then redraws 5.

cards.notes: Hand disruption. Opponent loses hand configuration â€” destroys set-up plays and counter holdings. Single copy suggests situational use.

card_versions.effect_text: [On Play] Your opponent returns all cards in their hand to their deck and shuffles it. Then, your opponent draws 5 cards.

effect_parsed.on_play: Opponent shuffles hand into deck, then redraws 5.

card_versions.notes: Initial record. Effective date unconfirmed — set when source verified.

cards.name: Sanji
cards.effect_text: This Character gains +1000 power for every 5 Event cards in your trash. If this Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may instead return 1 DON!! card from your cost area to your DON!! deck.

effect_parsed.condition: 5+ events in trash per +1000 power stack
effect_parsed.on_removal: Instead of being removed by opponent's effect, return 1 DON!! to DON!! deck.

cards.notes: Core engine. Power scales with trash count. Removal protection is also DON!! recovery â€” two functions in one. No counter means meant to stay on board.

card_versions.effect_text: This Character gains +1000 power for every 5 Event cards in your trash. If this Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may instead return 1 DON!! card from your cost area to your DON!! deck.

effect_parsed.condition: 5+ events in trash per +1000 power stack
effect_parsed.on_removal: Instead of being removed by opponent's effect, return 1 DON!! to DON!! deck.

card_versions.notes: Initial record. Effective date unconfirmed — set when source verified.

cards.name: Uso-Hachi
cards.effect_text: [On Play] If you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field, rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less.

effect_parsed.on_play: Rest 1 opponent's Character with cost 5 or less.

cards.notes: Late-game board control. 8 DON!! threshold is very late â€” turn 6+. Single copy suggests tech card. Rests a target for a free attack.

card_versions.effect_text: [On Play] If you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field, rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less.

effect_parsed.on_play: Rest 1 opponent's Character with cost 5 or less.

card_versions.notes: Initial record. Effective date unconfirmed — set when source verified.

cards.name: Vinsmoke Reiju
cards.effect_text: If there are 4 or more Event cards in your trash: This Character gains +2000 power, gains a cost of +5, and gains [Blocker].

effect_parsed.blocker: Gained conditionally â€” only when 4+ events in trash.
effect_parsed.cost_increase: +5 to own cost when condition met (becomes 9)

cards.notes: Pre-threshold: 4-cost 5000 with 1000 counter â€” below rate. Post-threshold: 4-cost 7000 Blocker â€” above rate. +5 cost effect raises her effective KO cost for opponent.

card_versions.effect_text: If there are 4 or more Event cards in your trash: This Character gains +2000 power, gains a cost of +5, and gains [Blocker].

effect_parsed.blocker: Gained conditionally â€” only when 4+ events in trash.
effect_parsed.cost_increase: +5 to own cost when condition met (becomes 9)

card_versions.notes: Initial record. Effective date unconfirmed — set when source verified.

cards.name: Vinsmoke Reiju
cards.effect_text: [On Play] / [Your Turn] DON!! -1: If your Leader is [Sanji], activate the [Main] effect of up to 1 Event card in your trash with an original cost of 7 or less.

effect_parsed.on_play: DON!! -1: Reactivate [Main] effect of 1 Event in trash (original cost 7 or less).
effect_parsed.your_turn: DON!! -1: Reactivate [Main] effect of 1 Event in trash (original cost 7 or less).

cards.notes: Most flexible engine card. Reactivates trash events. [Your Turn] means usable every turn she's on board, not just on play. Covers cost 7 â€” hits Gravity Blade Raging Tiger.

card_versions.effect_text: [On Play] / [Your Turn] DON!! -1: If your Leader is [Sanji], activate the [Main] effect of up to 1 Event card in your trash with an original cost of 7 or less.

effect_parsed.your_turn: DON!! -1: Reactivate [Main] effect of 1 Event in trash (original cost 7 or less).

cards.name: Rosinante & Law
cards.effect_text: Also treated as a card named [Trafalgar Law] and [Donquixote Rosinante]. [Blocker] [On Play] If your DON!! count is the same or less than your opponent's, draw 1 card and add 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck as active.

effect_parsed.on_play: If your DON!! <= opponent's: draw 1, add 1 DON!! from deck as active.

cards.notes: 8000 Blocker with DON!! recovery and draw on condition. Dual name means it may satisfy name-based conditions for both Law and Rosinante cards.

card_versions.effect_text: Also treated as a card named [Trafalgar Law] and [Donquixote Rosinante]. [Blocker] [On Play] If your DON!! count is the same or less than your opponent's, draw 1 card and add 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck as active.

effect_parsed.on_play: If your DON!! <= opponent's: draw 1, add 1 DON!! from deck as active.

cards.name: Sanji
cards.effect_text: If your DON!! count is 2 or more less than your opponent's, this card's cost is reduced by 3 in your hand. [Blocker]

effect_parsed.cost_reduction: -3 cost in hand when condition met (becomes 3-cost)
effect_parsed.condition: Your DON!! count is 2+ less than opponent's

cards.notes: Manufactured tempo card. Leader recovers DON!! intentionally to trigger this 3-cost condition. 6000 Blocker for 3 DON!! is above rate. High counter value (2000) makes it useful even in hand.

card_versions.effect_text: If your DON!! count is 2 or more less than your opponent's, this card's cost is reduced by 3 in your hand. [Blocker]

effect_parsed.cost_reduction: -3 cost in hand when condition met (becomes 3-cost)
effect_parsed.condition: Your DON!! count is 2+ less than opponent's

card_versions.notes: Initial record. Effective date unconfirmed — set when source verified.

cards.name: Concasser
cards.effect_text: [Main] If your Leader is [Sanji], draw 1 card. [Counter] If there are 4 or more Event cards in your trash: Your Leader gains +4000 power during this battle.

effect_parsed.activate_main: If leader is [Sanji], draw 1.
effect_parsed.counter: If 4+ events in trash: Leader gains +4000 power this battle.

cards.notes: Dual purpose. Main: cantrip that also puts event in trash (advances threshold). Counter: conditional +4000 to Leader â€” huge defensive swing. Going to trash on main use advances threshold count.

card_versions.effect_text: [Main] If your Leader is [Sanji], draw 1 card. [Counter] If there are 4 or more Event cards in your trash: Your Leader gains +4000 power during this battle.

effect_parsed.activate_main: If leader is [Sanji], draw 1.

cards.name: Gum-Gum Giant
cards.effect_text: [Counter] DON!! -2, trash 1 card from your hand: If your Leader has the {Straw Hat Crew} type, up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle, and draw 2 cards.

effect_parsed.counter: DON!! -2, trash 1 from hand: If leader has {Straw Hat Crew}: Leader/Character +4000 this battle, draw 2.

cards.notes: Counter that replaces itself via draw 2. Net cost: 1 card (trash 1, draw 2, net +1) + DON!! -2. Powerful but DON!! intensive as counter. Also goes to trash â€” advances event count.

card_versions.effect_text: [Counter] DON!! -2, trash 1 card from your hand: If your Leader has the {Straw Hat Crew} type, up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle, and draw 2 cards.

effect_parsed.counter: DON!! -2, trash 1 from hand: If leader has {Straw Hat Crew}: Leader/Character +4000 this battle, draw 2.

cards.name: I Heard the Sound...of a Lady's Teardrops Falling
cards.effect_text: [Main] If your Leader is [Sanji], look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Reveal up to 1 [Sanji] card or Event card and add it to your hand. Place the remaining cards at the bottom of your deck in any order. [Counter] Trash 1 card from your hand: Up to 1 of your [Sanji] cards gains +4000 power during this battle.

effect_parsed.activate_main: If leader is [Sanji]: look top 3, reveal 1 [Sanji] or Event, add to hand; rest on bottom.
effect_parsed.counter: Trash 1 from hand: 1 [Sanji] card gains +4000 this battle.

cards.notes: Tutor + counter. Main finds Sanji characters or events â€” fills both roles. Counter targets specifically [Sanji] named cards. Synergizes with OP12-070 and OP07-064.

card_versions.effect_text: [Main] If your Leader is [Sanji], look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Reveal up to 1 [Sanji] card or Event card and add it to your hand. Place the remaining cards at the bottom of your deck in any order. [Counter] Trash 1 card from your hand: Up to 1 of your [Sanji] cards gains +4000 power during this battle.

cards.name: Slave Arrow
cards.effect_text: [Counter] Return 1 of your Characters with a cost of 2 or more to its owner's hand: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. [Trigger] Draw 2 cards, then place 2 cards from your hand at the bottom of your deck.

effect_parsed.counter: Return 1 of your Characters (cost 2+) to hand: Leader/Character +4000 this battle.
effect_parsed.trigger: Draw 2, then put 2 from hand on bottom of deck.

cards.notes: Counter bounces your own character to hand for +4000. Can reset OP12-070 Sanji's DON!! protection. Trigger is card quality filter. Single copy.

card_versions.effect_text: [Counter] Return 1 of your Characters with a cost of 2 or more to its owner's hand: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. [Trigger] Draw 2 cards, then place 2 cards from your hand at the bottom of your deck.

cards.name: Luffy Is the Man Who Will Be King of the Pirates!!!
cards.effect_text: [Main] If your Leader is [Sanji], look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Add up to 1 card to your hand and rest the remaining cards at the bottom of your deck.

effect_parsed.activate_main: If leader is [Sanji]: look top 3, add 1 to hand, rest on bottom.

cards.notes: 0-cost tutor. Free deck filter every turn via Leader's Activate: Main (costs DON!! -1 when used through leader). Goes to trash on use â€” counts toward event threshold.

cards.name: Stealth Black
cards.effect_text: [Main] If your Leader is [Sanji] and you have 4 or more DON!! cards on your field: Play up to 1 [Sanji] Character card with a cost of 6 or less from your hand or trash without paying its cost. [Trigger] Draw 2 cards, then trash 1 card from your hand.

effect_parsed.activate_main: If leader is [Sanji] and 4+ DON!! on field: play 1 [Sanji] Character (cost 6 or less) from hand or trash for free.
effect_parsed.condition: Leader is [Sanji] AND 4+ DON!! on field

cards.notes: Recursion engine. Can pull OP12-070 or OP07-064 from trash for free. Trigger is strong draw. 4 DON!! condition is early-mid game accessible.

card_versions.effect_text: [Main] If your Leader is [Sanji] and you have 4 or more DON!! cards on your field: Play up to 1 [Sanji] Character card with a cost of 6 or less from your hand or trash without paying its cost. [Trigger] Draw 2 cards, then trash 1 card from your hand.

cards.name: Brochette Blow
cards.effect_text: [Main] If your DON!! count is the same or less than your opponent's, draw 1 card. Then, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters -3000 power during this turn.

effect_parsed.activate_main: If DON!! <= opponent's: draw 1. Then opponent's Character -3000 power this turn.

cards.notes: DON!! parity condition matches Leader's own condition. Draw 1 + power reduction opens attack lanes. Single copy.

card_versions.effect_text: [Main] If your DON!! count is the same or less than your opponent's, draw 1 card. Then, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters -3000 power during this turn.

cards.name: Gum-Gum Jet Culverin
cards.effect_text: [Main] Place up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 4 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck. [Trigger] Place up to 1 Character with a cost of 1 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck.

effect_parsed.activate_main: Place 1 opponent's Character (base cost 4 or less) at bottom of deck.
effect_parsed.trigger: Place 1 Character (cost 1 or less) at bottom of deck.

cards.notes: Removal via deck bounce. Hits most mid-cost threats. Does not KO â€” opponent gets card back eventually. Single copy. First card to reach L3_verified status.

card_versions.effect_text: [Main] Place up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 4 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck. [Trigger] Place up to 1 Character with a cost of 1 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck.

cards.name: Gum-Gum Red Roc
cards.effect_text: [Main] Place up to 1 of your opponent's Characters at the bottom of the owner's deck. [Trigger] Place up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck.

effect_parsed.activate_main: Place 1 opponent's Character (any cost) at bottom of deck.
effect_parsed.trigger: Place 1 opponent's Character (cost 4 or less) at bottom of deck.

cards.notes: Unconditional removal. No cost restriction on Main effect â€” hits anything. 6 cost is expensive. Main mode activated through EB03-031 Reiju to bypass cost.

cards.name: Gravity Blade Raging Tiger
cards.effect_text: [Main] Place up to 2 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 6 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck. [Trigger] Place up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck.

effect_parsed.activate_main: Place up to 2 opponent's Characters (cost 6 or less) at bottom of deck.
effect_parsed.trigger: Place 1 opponent's Character (cost 5 or less) at bottom of deck.

cards.notes: Board wipe equivalent. 2-for-1 bounce at 7 cost. Normally expensive â€” EB03-031 Reiju recycles this from trash at DON!! -1. Hitting 2 characters is massive tempo swing.

card_versions.effect_text: [Main] Place up to 2 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 6 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck. [Trigger] Place up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less at the bottom of the owner's deck.

effect_parsed.activate_main: Place up to 2 opponent's Characters (cost 6 or less) at bottom of deck.
effect_parsed.trigger: Place 1 opponent's Character (cost 5 or less) at bottom of deck.

cards.name: Boeuf Burst
cards.effect_text: [Main] If your Leader is multicolored, choose 1: Return up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less to its owner's hand. OR If you have 6 or less cards in your hand, draw 2 cards.

effect_parsed.activate_main: If leader is multicolored, choose: bounce 1 opponent's Character (cost 4 or less) to hand, OR draw 2 if you have 6 or less cards in hand.

cards.notes: Modal event â€” always relevant. Bounce mode is removal. Draw mode is hand refill. Sanji leader is Blue/Purple (multicolored) so condition always met. 4x backbone of the event suite.

card_versions.effect_text: [Main] If your Leader is multicolored, choose 1: Return up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less to its owner's hand. OR If you have 6 or less cards in your hand, draw 2 cards.

effect_parsed.activate_main: If leader is multicolored, choose: bounce 1 opponent's Character (cost 4 or less) to hand, OR draw 2 if you have 6 or less cards in hand.
